using System;
using System.Collections.Concurrent;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;
using System.Threading;
using System.Threading.Tasks;

public sealed class BenchmarkRunner
{
    private readonly string _stateFile;
    private readonly ConcurrentDictionary<string, BenchmarkResult> _results = new();
    private readonly SemaphoreSlim _modelLock = new(1, 1); // Ensures single model server at a time

    public BenchmarkRunner(string stateFilePath)
    {
        _stateFile = stateFilePath;
        LoadState();
    }

    public async Task<BenchmarkResult> RunAsync(BenchmarkContext context, CancellationToken ct = default)
    {
        var key = $"{context.Repository}/{context.Model}";

        // Idempotency check
        if (_results.TryGetValue(key, out var existing) && existing.Status == Status.Completed)
            return existing;

        // Serialize access to the heavy model server
        await _modelLock.WaitAsync(ct);
        try
        {
            // Simulate Docker harness execution with watchdog timeout
            var values = await ExecuteDockerHarnessAsync(context, ct);
            var score = context.Score(values);
            var result = new BenchmarkResult(key, score, Status.Completed);
            
            _results[key] = result;
            SaveState();
            return result;
        }
        catch (OperationCanceledException)
        {
            var result = new BenchmarkResult(key, 0, Status.Cancelled);
            _results[key] = result;
            SaveState();
            throw;
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            var result = new BenchmarkResult(key, 0, Status.Failed, ex.Message);
            _results[key] =
